calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

John P. Zanghi, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation.
Witness Inga Lewis sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Mark Arellanes.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Assisted Lease Agreement
2-Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit
3-Proof of Service of Notice on Legal Tenant
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2524 Mission Street #310, City and County of San Francisco, California 94110.

Damages $5837.00
Holdover damages $939.40
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $315.00
For a Total Judgment of $7091.40

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 8
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Ingall Lewis.
Attorney John P. Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mark Arellanes is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of January 30, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
